The 4 Main Advantages for you

Why participate in Bipzy Launchpad?

Why participate in Bipzy Launchpad?

Invest in the best gems
Thanks to the influence of our ambassadors, we get the best allocations for the most promising projects.
Get the lowest prices
You will be able to invest at an early stage before the tokens hit the masses and get listed on major exchanges.
Rigorously selected projects
We carefully select projects, vetting and verifying the origin and legitimacy of the project team, the innovation of the idea and its ability to execute its vision.
Flexible options to invest
We support the most popular chains so you can choose the one that suits you best and save on commissions: Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, Polygon, Arbitrum.

priority access

Frequently Asked

Questions?

Questions?

What is a launchpad?

+

A launchpad is a platform that boosts projects by allowing them to raise funds through the presale of their future token, known as an IDO. On the other hand, a launchpad allows private investors to enter in a very early stage that creates the possibility of achieving high returns.

What makes Bipzy different from other launchpads?

+

Thanks to our expert team of crypto analysts, we can make an important filter of those projects that will be most promoted. Additionally, our extensive connection with influencers ensures that the projects receive significant exposure, greatly increasing their chances of success.

What are the advantages Bipzy offers to investors?

+

On Bipzy's launchpad you can invest with the confidence that all the projects have been strictly reviewed and passed through a tough selection process.

What average return do investors get?

+

Although we cannot guarantee any return per project, you can find the average return (since bipzy launch) updated every day on this page.

How Does BIPZY Generate Revenue?

+

It's crucial to understand that, unlike other launchpads, Bipzy does not charge any entry fees nor does it have its own token from which it draws liquidity from investors.

Therefore, it employs one of these two strategies (whichever is feasible):

1) A private agreement is reached with the project, in which Bipzy secures a free allocation or an additional discount on the price of the tokens, exclusively for the company.

2) Bipzy earns a small percentage commission from the presale allocation always maintaining a competitive valuation for the project. Under no circumstances will an excessive commission be established that could harm the potential high returns for investors.

The launchpad always handles top-tier projects at valuations below market offerings. Thus, the main goal of Bipzy is to make its investors earn money, since thanks to this model, we only succeed if you do.

What are the benefits of holding a Bipzys NFT?

+

Holding a Bipzys NFT allows you to have 24h priority access to invest in the projects listed on the launchpad.

What is the average investment raised per project?

+

Bipzy funding goals per project oscillates between $30,000 and $500,000 .

Can anyone invest in the projects?

+

Anyone of legal age who knows the risks associated with investing in cryptocurrencies and their money does not come from any illegal activity.

Can any project be listed on Bipzy?

+

No, only presales of projects that have been carefully selected by a team of experts are listed on Bipzy's launchpad.

Apply To Launch

Bipzy LaunchPad is a platform for the launch and funding of innovative blockchain projects. It connects project teams with investors, providing a space to showcase ideas, raise capital through token sales, and facilitate community engagement in the crypto space.
